title: Why Is The Crypto Market Up Today?
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The crypto market is up today due to pre-FOMC de-risking and a mild recovery, with Bitcoin rising above $77,000.
excerpt: The crypto market is up today due to pre-FOMC de-risking and a mild recovery, with Bitcoin rising above $77,000.

content.introduction: The crypto market is up today due to pre-FOMC de-risking and a mild recovery, with Bitcoin rising above $77,000.
body: The crypto market is up 1.11% to $2.54 trillion as pre-FOMC de-risking pulls capital out of S&P 500 into crypto ahead of Powell's decision.
The broader cryptocurrency market shows a mild recovery on Friday, with Bitcoin rising above $77,000, up from Wednesday's low of $74,937. Altcoins, including
